# Phase 27: AI + Savings + Accounts + Analytics + Management — Context

**Gathered:** 2026-05-10
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Mode:** Auto-generated by autonomous orchestrator (discuss skipped — ROADMAP success_criteria + REQUIREMENTS detail используются как spec; Phase 25/26 patterns fully established).

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

5 экранов нового UX (per ROADMAP success_criteria):

1. **AI** (initial-state + active-state) — eyebrow «AI · ASSISTANT / ONLINE» + DM Serif Italic 36px observation (rule-engine: month surplus / over-limit / weekly savings / upcoming subs, cache 1h) + 4 chip-suggestions; active-state reuses v0.6 SSE streaming + AI tools.

2. **Savings** (чёрный фон) — Mass italic «Копилка.» + жёлтая plate «НАКОПЛЕНО ВСЕГО X ₽» + eyebrow «В МАЕ + Y ₽» + roundup toggle + base chips 10/50/100 ₽ (`PATCH /savings/config`) + карточки целей с posterBarFill + CTA «+ НОВАЯ ЦЕЛЬ» / «ПОПОЛНИТЬ» (bottom-sheet forms → `POST /goals` / `POST /savings/deposit`).

3. **Accounts list + Account Detail** — list (cream) с Mass italic «Счета.» + dark plate суммарно + bank rows + бейдж ОСНОВНОЙ. Detail (чёрный) с банк-name + 2 KPI plates («БАЛАНС» yellow + «В МАЕ · N ОПЕРАЦИЙ» dark) + список операций. CTA «ПЕРЕВОД» disabled («SOON»).

4. **Analytics** (cream, rewrite v0.6) — Mass italic «Месяц.» + segmented period (МАР/АПР/МАЙ) + 2 KPI plates («ПОТРАЧЕНО» с delta + «СЭКОНОМЛЕНО») + segmented group (ДЕНЬ/НЕД./КАТ.) + bar-chart (red ≥75% plan) + top-5 categories.

5. **Management** (чёрный) — 5 numbered list-rows «01 PLAN МЕСЯЦА / 02 СЧЕТА / 03 АНАЛИТИКА / 04 НАСТРОЙКИ / 05 ДОСТУП» (admin only). Settings — v0.6 rewrite в poster style. Access — v0.6 admin Users/AI Usage tabs poster-style.

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Locked from Phase 25/26 patterns (do NOT re-discuss)
- **Routing**: `PosterRouter` push routes for sub-screens (Account Detail, Settings, Access).
- **Tabs**: BottomNavV10 already has 4 tabs (home/savings/ai/mgmt) per Phase 25 plan 25-12. Now those tab targets get real screens.
- **Sheets**: PosterSheet stacking for «+ НОВАЯ ЦЕЛЬ» (primary) / «ПОПОЛНИТЬ» (secondary).
- **Money**: BIGINT cents.
- **API clients**: extend `frontend/src/api/v10/` and iOS `*V10API.swift` enums symmetrically.
- **Symmetry**: web ║ iOS plans pair 1:1.
- **AI streaming**: reuse existing v0.6 SSE infrastructure (`frontend/src/api/ai.ts` + iOS `AIChatAPI`); only the Phase 27 changes are: initial-state UI shell + 4 chip-suggestions + new rule-engine endpoint for observation.

### Open implementation choices (Claude's discretion)
- **AI rule-engine** (AI-V10-03): backend new endpoint `GET /ai/observation` returns `{text: string, generated_at: timestamp}`. Server caches 1h per user. Rule priority: (1) month surplus («{Month} в плюсе на X ₽»), (2) over-limit category («{Category} уже +N% к лимиту»), (3) weekly savings («За неделю экономия Y ₽»), (4) upcoming subs («Завтра списание подписок на Z ₽»). Fallback: «Веди учёт регулярно — {today}» template. Implementation: pure Python service, no LLM call.
- **Savings aggregator** (SAV-V10-01): backend `GET /savings/summary` → `{total_cents, current_period_delta_cents, roundup_enabled, roundup_base_cents, goals: GoalRead[]}`. Reuse Phase 22 SavingsConfig + Goal models. If endpoint missing → backend plan adds it.
- **Goals CRUD** (SAV-V10-03/04): GET/POST `/goals`, POST `/goals/{id}/contribute`. Phase 22 supposedly added Goal model — verify in planner.
- **Accounts CRUD** (ACCT-V10-02): POST `/accounts` form. Phase 22 added Account model + GET endpoint. Verify POST exists.
- **Analytics**: re-use v0.6 endpoints (`/analytics/period`, `/analytics/top-categories`); only UI rewrite. Add segmented period: backend already supports period_start/period_end query params.
- **MGMT-V10-04 Access tab**: gate with owner-role check (`me.role === 'owner'`). Show «Только для владельца» message for non-owners.
- **Settings poster-rewrite**: same data model, new visual layout. cycle_start_day = numeric stepper, notify_days_before = numeric stepper, AI toggle, AI cost cap = read-only display.
- **iOS «Settings» reachability**: Phase 27 Mgmt-хаб → push to PosterSettings screen. Web аналогично.

</decisions>

<code_context>
## Existing Code Insights

**Web** existing:
- `frontend/src/api/v10/{accounts,actual,categories,subscriptions,planMonth}.ts` — typed clients.
- `frontend/src/api/ai.ts`, `frontend/src/screensV10/Ai/...` — Phase 18 v0.6 AI implementation (SSE streaming, tools UI). Need to wrap in V10MainShell tab routing.
- `frontend/src/screensV10/V10MainShell.tsx` — shell composition. Tab handlers route to OnboardingMount currently — Phase 27 changes them to mount real Savings/AI/Mgmt views.
- v0.6 admin pages: `/admin/users`, `/admin/ai-usage` (re-style only).
- v0.6 settings: `frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx` (or similar) — re-style only.

**iOS** existing:
- `ios/BudgetPlanner/FeaturesV10/Common/V10Formatters.swift`, `BottomNavV10.swift`.
- `ios/BudgetPlanner/Features/AI/...` — v0.6 SSE chat. Wrap in V10MainShell ai-tab route.
- `ios/BudgetPlanner/App/V10MainShell.swift` — needs route handlers for savings/ai/mgmt tabs.

**Backend**:
- `app/api/routes/accounts.py`, `goals.py` (Phase 22). Verify `POST /accounts` exists.
- `app/api/routes/savings.py` (Phase 22) — verify `GET /savings/summary` + `PATCH /savings/config` + `POST /savings/deposit` exist.
- `app/api/routes/ai.py` — Phase 18 SSE endpoint exists. Add `GET /ai/observation` for AI-V10-03.
- `app/api/routes/analytics.py` — Phase 19 endpoints exist; just check period filter is supported.

</code_context>

<specifics>
## Specific Ideas

**Suggested wave structure** (planner refines):
- Wave 1 (backend prereqs, if needed): observation rule-engine endpoint + savings/goals/accounts gap fixes.
- Wave 2 (web): Mgmt hub + Savings + Accounts list/detail + Analytics + AI shell — 5 web plans parallel (different file trees within `screensV10/`).
- Wave 3 (iOS): same 5 screens iOS — 5 iOS plans parallel.
- Wave 4: cross-cutting — Settings rewrite (web+iOS, 2 plans) + Access page rewrite (web+iOS, 2 plans, owner-gated).
- Or collapse Wave 2/3 into single Wave-2 (10 plans parallel — ambitious but feasible if files disjoint).

Each frontend plan:
- Pure compute helpers in `compute*.ts` / `*Data.swift` (testable).
- View component (presentation).
- Mount/ViewModel (data + mutations).
- Tests: compute unit + view smoke.

</specifics>

- Analytics polygons / advanced charts → Phase 28 polish.
- AI rule-engine fancy NLP / personalization → v1.1.
- Pixel-perfect easing / chart smoothness → Phase 28.
